doctrine: Aggressor. 80-100% ahead. Zero broken anything. Compliance-native wedge.

categories.title: Strategic Doctrine Lock-in
categories.subtitle: The CFO charter and the foundational decisions

entries.title: CFO charter + authority grant
entries.description: Craig grants autonomous CFO authority to Claude. Decision framework, scope, escalation gates documented.

entries.title: Compliance-native wedge positioning
entries.description: Public positioning lock: Crontech is the compliance-native developer platform. SOC 2, HIPAA, FedRAMP-path built in.

entries.title: Competitor-free stack rule
entries.description: Never ship on infrastructure owned by a competitor we compete with at the platform layer. Locks out Vercel, Netlify, etc.

entries.title: Advantage Levers Tier 1-4 framework
entries.description: Tier 1 = do now. Tier 2 = next 90 days. Tier 3 = next 12 months. Tier 4 = anti-traps to AVOID.

entries.title: Founder Protection Framework (Simmer Protocol)
entries.description: Sundays off. 8pm NZT hard stop. Monthly walk-away day. Weekly check-in rhythm. Generational succession to Craig's daughter (20-30yr horizon).

entries.title: Generational succession plan
entries.description: Crontech is built to outlive Craig. 20-30 year horizon. Daughter as long-term successor. Every decision filters through this lens.

entries.title: Employment Mission (NZ/PH/US jobs toward $5M ARR)
entries.description: Hire 1 FTE now → 1 PH FTE (Month 6) → 3-5 FTEs (Month 12) → 20 FTEs ($5M ARR) → 35 FTEs ($10M ARR).

categories.title: CLAUDE.md PIN-gated drafts
categories.subtitle: Awaiting Craig's PIN to merge into the Bible

entries.title: §0.9 Employment Mission
entries.description: Lock the employment mission as binding doctrine in CLAUDE.md.
entries.blockedReason: Requires Craig's PIN to modify CLAUDE.md

entries.title: §0.10 Simmer Protocol + Generational Plan
entries.description: Lock founder protection and succession plan as binding doctrine.
entries.blockedReason: Requires Craig's PIN to modify CLAUDE.md

entries.title: §0.11 Competitor-Free Stack Rule
entries.description: Lock the no-competitor-infrastructure rule as binding doctrine.
entries.blockedReason: Requires Craig's PIN to modify CLAUDE.md

entries.title: Zod-first enum refactor (Severity, RepoPriority, RepoCategory)
entries.description: Types derived from Zod schemas. Runtime type guards added. Single source of truth.

entries.title: 15 new competitor repos added
entries.description: Cloudflare Workers SDK, Supabase, Convex, Fly, Netlify, Snyk, Whisper, bolt.new, and more.

entries.title: Exhaustive priorityOrder via Record<RepoPriority, number>
entries.description: Removed loose Record<string, number> with fallback. Compiler now enforces exhaustiveness.

entries.title: TRACKED_REPOS_SCHEMA_VERSION constant extraction
entries.description: Eliminated load/save drift by extracting the hardcoded schemaVersion.

entries.title: Test coverage expansion (25 → 37 tests, 150 expects)
entries.description: Added competitor coverage, dedup, priority/category coverage, type guard positive/negative, compiler narrowing.

entries.title: Zod-first AlertPriority + exhaustive Discord color map
entries.description: alerts/types.ts refactored to derive AlertPriority from Zod enum. isAlertPriority runtime guard added. DISCORD_EMBED_COLOR keyed as Record<AlertPriority, number> so the compiler flags any new priority.

entries.title: Hetzner box provisioning
entries.description: Provision the Phase 0 Hetzner bare-metal box. Install base OS, firewall, SSH hardening.
entries.blockedReason: Requires Craig to create the Hetzner account and share SSH access

entries.title: Phase 0 bootstrap script authored
entries.description: infra/phase-0.sh — idempotent Hetzner bootstrap. Hardens OS, creates crontech user, installs Docker + Bun + Caddy, creates /srv/crontech layout, deploys LGTM stack. 262 lines, bash -n clean.

entries.title: Phase 0 bootstrap script execution
entries.description: Run phase-0.sh on the Hetzner box to install Docker, Bun, Caddy, and the core runtime.

entries.title: LGTM observability stack authored
entries.description: infra/lgtm/ — full docker-compose with Loki 3.2.1, Tempo 2.6.1, Mimir 2.14.2, Grafana 11.3.1, OTel Collector 0.112.0. Configs for all 5 services. Auto-provisioned datasources. All bound to 127.0.0.1 (Caddy fronts them).

entries.title: LGTM observability stack deployment
entries.description: docker compose up on Hetzner box. Auto-provisioning wires Loki/Tempo/Mimir into Grafana on first start.

entries.title: Phase 0 runbook authored
entries.description: infra/README.md — provision → bootstrap → SSH keys → harden → DNS → Caddyfile → verify. Exit criteria checklist. Scaling notes.

entries.title: Stripe live mode activation
entries.description: Switch Stripe from test mode to live mode. Webhook secrets rotated. Live product IDs configured.

entries.title: NZ chartered accountant engagement
entries.description: Engage a NZ chartered accountant for GST, PAYE, tax structure advice.
entries.blockedReason: Craig must select and engage the firm

entries.title: MyHR NZ retainer (employment compliance)
entries.description: Employment compliance partner for NZ hires. Required before first FTE offer.

entries.title: NZ estate planning lawyer
entries.description: Estate planning to protect generational succession. Trust structure + will update.

categories.title: 7-Week Dogfood Migration
categories.subtitle: Move every Craig property onto Crontech

entries.title: 7-week migration playbooks authored
entries.description: docs/migrations/ — overview README + 7 weekly playbooks (week-1 through week-7). Day-by-day pre-flight, inventory, scaffold, port, migrate, cutover, decommission. Exit criteria + rollback triggers per week. ~1100 lines total.

entries.title: Week 0: Bootstrap exit criteria
entries.description: Hetzner box live, LGTM green, Stripe live, auth working, deploy pipeline working.

entries.title: Week 1: MarcoReid.com dress rehearsal
entries.description: First production site on Crontech. Low-stakes dress rehearsal for the migration pipeline. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 2: emailed.io
entries.description: Migrate emailed to Crontech. First real SaaS workload with active Stripe subscriptions. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 3: Astra + CFO engine + audit log debut
entries.description: Migrate Astra accounting platform. Neon for ledger. Hash-chained audit log with RFC 3161 timestamps debuts. 14-day decommission buffer. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 4: AI-Immigration-Compliance
entries.description: First compliance-heavy legal tech workload. WORM document storage. Client-side WebGPU inference for PII. Chain of custody audit log. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 5: GateTest (recursive self-scan)
entries.description: Migrate GateTest QA/security platform. GateTest scans Front-Back itself on Day 5. Isolated scan workers. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 6: Voice/transcription (three-tier AI)
entries.description: Migrate the voice + transcription stack. Three-tier inference: WebGPU (tiny) → Workers AI (small/medium) → Modal H100 (large-v3). Qdrant semantic search. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Week 7: Zoobicon (AI website builder flagship)
entries.description: Migrate Zoobicon. Generative UI (component trees, not raw HTML). Yjs collab with AI agent as first-class participant. Completes the 7-week cycle. Playbook authored.

entries.title: Compliance-native wedge publicly locked
entries.description: POSITIONING.md committed. Landing page copy aligned. All marketing surfaces on-message.

entries.title: Anchor customer hunt
entries.description: First paying customer who validates the compliance-native wedge. HIGHEST priority of everything. Playbook drafted.

entries.title: Anchor customer hunt playbook authored
entries.description: docs/ANCHOR_CUSTOMER_HUNT.md — full ICP, channels, outreach cadence, qualifying criteria, deal structure, exit criteria, failure modes. Draft awaiting Craig's voice pass.

entries.title: Founder brand cadence
entries.description: Craig writes publicly 2-3x/week. Build in public. Compliance-native thesis on display.

entries.title: @crontech/audit-log OSS library
entries.description: Hash-chained, RFC 3161 timestamped audit log library. Open source. Lead-gen for the compliance wedge.

entries.title: SOC 2 Type I readiness
entries.description: Full SOC 2 Type I audit prep. Policies, controls, evidence collection in place.

entries.title: First Philippines FTE
entries.description: First PH engineering hire. Part of the employment mission ladder.

entries.title: Three design partners
entries.description: Three non-paying design partners shaping v1. Compliance-heavy verticals preferred.

entries.title: Sentinel productization
entries.description: Spin Sentinel out as a standalone product. Revenue channel + moat.

entries.title: NZ government contracts
entries.description: Pursue NZ government compliance contracts. Leverages NZ sovereignty + our compliance wedge.

entries.title: Provisional patents
entries.description: File provisional patents on our novel compliance primitives (hash-chained audit, three-tier compute, CRDT + AI collab).

entries.title: Advisory board
entries.description: Assemble a compliance + legal-tech advisory board. 3-5 people. Quarterly meetings.

entries.title: Don't match Vercel feature-for-feature
entries.description: We do not compete on breadth. We compete on the compliance wedge. Every feature must serve the wedge.

entries.title: Don't perfect the architecture
entries.description: Ship crappy and fix. Perfection is the enemy of the anchor customer.

entries.title: Don't over-build the admin
entries.description: Admin is a tool, not a product. Ship the minimum that unblocks operators.

entries.title: Don't take VC money
entries.description: Bootstrap to $5M ARR. VC optionality preserved only at $10M+ ARR and only for specific strategic reasons.

entries.title: Don't hire a GM early
entries.description: Craig runs the company until product-market fit is undeniable. No GM until $3M+ ARR.

entries.title: Don't broaden positioning
entries.description: Compliance-native wedge only. No 'also a general PaaS'. No 'also for AI builders'. ONE wedge.
